title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
# IDBI Bank Salary Account
As a Corporate Salary account holder, we provide you with exclusive privileges and convenient banking Facilities. 
# IDBI Bank Salary Account Variants are available as per employee Net Minimum Monthly Salary




  * Sweep out Facility to earn Higher rate of Interest*
  * Free SMS Alerts, Phone Banking / Mobile Banking / Internet Banking*
  * Nil AMC on your Demat Account for the 1st year


Get a Platinum / Gold / Silver / Bronze Salary Account in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI bank brings a special salary accounts for their selective customers to make the most of your earned money by keeping your requirements in mind.
